data_description.time_bucket_size_in_minutes: The time resolution for learning patterns. Smaller values (15-30 min) capture quick changes, larger values (120-240 min) focus on broader patterns.
data_description.state_persistence_factor: How strongly states tend to persist (0.0 = states change freely, 1.0 = states rarely change). Typical: 0.1-0.5. Adjust based on device behavior.
data_description.adaptive_persistence: Learn state-specific persistence (e.g., ON states may be stickier than OFF states). Recommended for most devices.
data_description.half_life_hours: How quickly old patterns fade (0 = never fade, 168 = 1 week half-life, 720 = 30 days). Use 0 for stable patterns, higher values for evolving habits or seasonal changes. Max: 8760 hours (1 year).

error.already_configured: The unique ID is already used!

init.title: Temporal Pattern Configuration
init.description: Configure which temporal patterns the forecaster should learn. More patterns provide better accuracy but require more training data.

data_description.use_day_of_week: Enable to learn different patterns for weekdays vs weekends (e.g., work schedules, office equipment)
data_description.use_month_of_year: Enable to learn seasonal patterns that repeat monthly (e.g., HVAC, irrigation, outdoor lighting)
data_description.state_persistence_factor: How strongly states tend to persist (0.0 = states change freely, 1.0 = states rarely change). Typical: 0.1-0.5. Can be tuned without resetting learned patterns.
data_description.adaptive_persistence: Learn state-specific persistence (e.g., ON states may be stickier than OFF states). Can be toggled without resetting learned patterns.
data_description.half_life_hours: How quickly old patterns fade (0 = never fade, 168 = 1 week, 720 = 30 days). Useful for evolving habits or seasonal changes. Can be adjusted without resetting learned patterns.

confirm_reset.title: ⚠️ Confirm Pattern Reset
confirm_reset.description:
**Warning**: Changing which temporal patterns to learn (day of week, month) will **delete all learned data**.

The forecaster will start learning from scratch, which may take **several days or weeks** to build accurate predictions again.

**All current learned patterns will be permanently lost.**

Are you sure you want to continue?

data.confirm: Yes, reset learned patterns and apply new settings
